title: Golden Gate Assembly Protocol Level 1/2
author: Vinca Seiler
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.8d4hs8w
materials: 0.5 µL BsaI-HF ® v2(NEB) for lvl 1 / EspI3 (NEB) for lvl 2

steps.instruction: 0.5 µL of each DNA insert. For an improved assembly efficiency, the amount of DNA inserts can optionally be normalized to equimolar concentrations (∼ 20 fmol each) or use 75 ng of each insert (antibiotic resistance part should be diluted 1:10, 7.5 ng - 10 ng ).

steps.title: Water to 10 µL
steps.instruction: Water to 10 µL . ( 20 µL also possible) 0.5 µL of each DNA insert

steps.title: Add 2 µL - 5 µL...
steps.instruction: Add 2 µL - 5 µL of each assembly reaction added to 50 µL competent cells.

steps.title: Cells should be recovered for 01:00:00...
steps.instruction: Cells should be recovered for 01:00:00 (Amp) to 00:02:00 (Kan, Chloramphenicol).
